feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Best Way to Reserve Stock Without MRP Impact
entry.content:
Hi all,

What is the best way to reserve stock in SAP, so that it has no MRP impact and new POs are not triggered? Is there a particular movement type that it would be advisable to use in order to achieve this please? Or is there any other way altogether that not involve reservations? The system should also prevent the reserved qty from being consumed. 

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Bunie

entry.title: New Handling Unit Transactions in S/4HANA - COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear
entry.content:
Dear all,

in the ECC world we speak about different Handling Unit Transactions like COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE.

But if we implement now the S/4HANA System, then these transactions COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear.

Which new replacement transactions will be for them in S/4HANA world? 

 

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Chris

entry.title: HOW TO GENERATE AN CUSTOMIZED REPORT FOR P2P (PROCURE TO PAY)?
entry.content:
Dear All,

How to generate a customized report for P2P (Procure to pay) i.e: Purchase requisition>PR Authorization>creation of Purchase order>create GRN>Invoice receipt in finance>Payment released to the respective vendor?

 

Thanks, @scm @SAPMM

entry.title: Depleting Inventory - notification to charge customer
entry.content:
Hello - 

There are a few products that we order that are "customer specific", which means that the raw material only goes into 1 or 2 finished goods, for 1 customer.  

For those instances, we have a supply agreement in place with the customer, saying that if the product expires, or they discontinue using that item, that they would be responsible for the balance of inventory.  

Is there a way in SAP, (not in an attachment in MM03) - that when the item is up for expiration, or when the item will be discontinued, a pop up comes up, referencing something like: "customer specific material, charge customer".

entry.title: ODN number range should be continues for both domestic and export documents
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently i am facing a issue in ODN numbering. My Indian client requirement is to have same ODN number range for both domestic and export documents. Domestic invoice configuration for ODN is already done, now they need ODN for Export.

I have configured ODN for Export invoice and number ranges i have copied from domestic invoice, but the requirement is to have a continuous number range for both Domestic and Export, but when i have tested the export document, the ODN number is not continuous to domestic, two tax invoice numbers with same number is been generated

Domestic invoice

Export Invoice ODN

Please kindly help me in this on urgent basis.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Stock Room Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP WM will disappear after 2027 in the S/4HANA world.

Stock Room Management is part of SAP WM but with less functionalities. It has the same coding and the same tables like SAP WM.

Furthermore Stock Room Management have the same transactions like SAP WM.

But how I make the difference in the system that I use Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

Is there a customizing setting that I choose Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

How I make the difference in the system?

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Christian

entry.title: In APO, /SAPAPO/CDPS_REPT OPEN QUANTITY IS NOT CONSIDERING ALTERNATIVE UNIT OF MEASURE
entry.content: In /SAPAPO?CDPS_REPT, when the alternative unit of measure is specified on the selection screen, the output for the open quantity has not been provided in that alternative unit of measure.

entry.title: How to find all the actions made on a supplier sheet (modifications, deactivations) on SAP ECC6
entry.content:
Hello dear community

How to have the history of actions made on a supplier sheet (modification, deactivation,....)

I have the supplier sheet, but I don't know which transaction to launch or how to proceed

thank you for guiding

Regards

entry.title: Generate PDF version of closed checklists
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I need help pls, i want to create a business rule that make me to Generate PDF version of closed checklist, i tryed this solution but always i had problem 

 

thank you

entry.title: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content:
For 1 freight order the system creates automatically different freight settlements to different dates automatically and that is not correct.

It should be that for 1 Freight order the system creates only 1 freight settlement document.

The steps are following in the system:

When departed it makes automatic goods issue of the delivery note.

Furthermore 1 Freight settlement is automatically created.

When the GI is registered then 1 correct freight settlement is automatically created (via JOBPLANER)

This example was correct.

But suddenly to a later point for example 03.01.2024 or 28.12.2023 a further freight settlement is automatically created. And that is not correct.

The yellow marked freight settlement documents were created automatically without any change in the system.

Here are some Screenshots:

 

I checked already the customizing and the master data I did not find an issue in these areas.

Is there maybe an SAP Note? Or is it there anything in Coding ABAP?

How is it possible to solve this problem?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Multiple batches for finished good boxes in a single production order - for scanning purpose?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a scenario where the production order booking should work with scanning of a barcode for each finished box. That means a production order with 100 pieces is released and when first box with 10pcs is finished it should be booked by scanning a barcode ( partial booking of 10 pcs) in its label. So what to scan is the problem where I stay. 

Any chance so that I can create seperate batch for each box at the time of production order release and print the label with those batches and use them to book it?  

Storage unit creation and booking it with storage unit was one of our thought. But at the time of production order creation no SU are normally created so it has to be programmed. With this  a unique SU number is generated and stored in a ztable with quantity, storage unit type etc. and this comes in labels and can be used to book production order. ( ABAP and Scanner programming is needed here) .

Any other solutions to do this in a standard way?

Thanks and best regards,

Kailas

entry.title: Multiple batches for finished good boxes in a single production order - for scanning purpose?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a scenario where the production order booking should work with scanning of a barcode for each finished box. That means a production order with 100 pieces is released and when first box with 10pcs is finished it should be booked by scanning a barcode ( partial booking of 10 pcs) in its label. So what to scan is the problem where I stay. 

Any chance so that I can create seperate batch for each box at the time of production order release and print the label with those batches and use them to book it?  

Storage unit creation and booking it with storage unit was one of our thought. But at the time of production order creation no SU are normally created so it has to be programmed. With this  a unique SU number is generated and stored in a ztable with quantity, storage unit type etc. and this comes in labels and can be used to book production order. ( ABAP and Scanner programming is needed here) .

Any other solutions to do this in a standard way?

Adding answers to the question from Andreas:-

  • Are you using EWM or WM? Is the storage location you want to post the goods receipt into MM managed, WM managed or EWM managed? Your question mentions "storage units" which are used in WM, but in EWM

No, we do not have EWM, only WM. We have created some storage types which are storage unit capable. GR from production order goes to 901 storage type (WM) and then will be directed to another storage type where storage units are active. 

  • You mention a scan which should result in a goods receipt posting. What is the content of the barcode?

The scanning is now planned with storage unit number. But this is my question that if there is any possibility to bring batches there instead of storage units. I just need the booking to work with scanning. The GR (101)booking and back flush (261) of components are triggered from this scanning. Plan is to use standard CO11N triggered from scanner.

  • You mention batches and you mention a separate batch for each box. Why would you want to do that?

Yes, I mean a separate batch for each box. If not, how I book a single box with a scan? I am searching if there is any standard process for this.

Hope I cleared the questions. 

Thanks and best regards,

Kailas

entry.title: Mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Is it's possible to do a mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Block batch before arrives
entry.content:
I have a part number that I will receive a specific batch that I have to block at the company's entrance.

It is a schedule agreement not a closed order. Do you know how I can block a specific batch before it arrives?

entry.title: When creating a production task, the input products are not calculating relative to output product.
entry.content:
Hi,

We are setting up production orders in SAP ByDesign. I have built out the BOM's created a BoO and production model. All works fine, except when I have a production order for output quantity 100 it is not multiplying input quantity to match.

 

e.g. raw material (steel) is used to make a component, for 1 unit requires 0.033m of steel, you would expect input products to be 100 x 0.033m (3.3m) for the 100 finished products. 

What is likely wrong in the production model, BOM or BoO which is causing this not to calculate?

entry.title: How to find the draft Blog in sap community
entry.content:
I created one blog and saved it as a draft in 2024.

How to find it.

Link this is not usefull

entry.title: Mass upload of CVC in MD62 and SDP94
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Could you please tell us how to upload allocation data for multiple materials at once in SAPAPO/MC62 and /SAPAPO/SDP94.

 

Thank You.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: In MD07 traffic siginal, What is definition of 1st Receipt DS and 2nd Receipt DS?
entry.content: In MD07 traffic siginal, What is definition of 1st Receipt DS and 2nd Receipt DS?

entry.title: CDS view to find the Classification characteristic description field for a supplier
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently trying to implement Flexible workflow for PO on SAP public cloud based on the condition that if the Suppliers Classification characteristic description i.e.  P2P exemption is Yes/No. but i am unbale to find the CDS view linking the Supplier/Business partner and the Classification data for them. could you guys help if you know of any CDS view that i can link to achieve this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: EDI 856 ASN Outbound to Customer from GR document
entry.content:
Hi,

we are designing a third-party process flow for Our client, where we receive Customer PO into S4HANA system, and a sales order is created from which Auto PR/PO is created. PO is sent to a Third-party Vendor for shipment to customer. Vendor ships the goods and send us back a shipping confirmation. Based on the Inbound ASN from vendor we do statistical GR for the PO.

In this above scenario, we need to send an outbound ASN 856 to customer from S4 HANA system. Is there any possibility to generate the Outbound ASN 856 from GR document?
